queries.question: Provide a list of Boeing aircraft and also display airbus aircraft with 180 seats.
queries.sql:
SELECT Boeing.Model
FROM Boeing
UNION
SELECT Airbus.Model
FROM Airbus
WHERE Airbus.Number_of_seats = 180

queries.question: Display Boeing aircrafts and Airbus aircrafts with 180 seats.
queries.sql:
SELECT Boeing.Model
FROM Boeing
WHERE Boeing.Number_of_seats = 180
UNION
SELECT Airbus.Model
FROM Airbus
WHERE Airbus.Number_of_seats = 180

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display Boeing aircrafts and Airbus aircrafts with 180 seats.
